action.reasoning: Observation: Pi0 zero-shot got 0.0 success rate. Eval took ~2.3h. Analysis: The zero-shot Pi0 policy fails because: 1) Action bridge scaling is wrong - Pi0 outputs LIBERO-normalized actions but I'm applying tiny deltas, 2) No fine-tuning on VLABench training data. With 7.3h remaining and ~2.3h per eval, I have time for ~1 more eval. Decision: Fine-tune Pi0 with LoRA on the training data, fix action bridge scaling. First explore training data to understand action conventions, then train.
